title: Ownership Structure
subtitle: All building blocks underlying the founding split decision. Hover any block for detail.

scoringViews.name: Where we are
scoringViews.description: Color and dots show how far along each building block is — from named only, to drafted, to produced but pending sign-off, to fully complete and aligned.

scoringViews.name: How important it is
scoringViews.description: Color and dots show how much each block matters to the founding split specifically — not in general, but as an input to this particular decision. Critical items are ones where gaps could meaningfully change the number or create regret later.

blocks.name: Founding Principles
blocks.description: The shared philosophy governing how we work, create, and make decisions together.
blocks.output: Nine principles across relational, creative, and governance layers — synthesized from individual founder sessions and 31 extracted themes. All three founders aligned.

blocks.name: Branding & Identity
blocks.description: Company name, visual identity, and brand positioning.

blocks.name: How We Work Together
blocks.description: Working norms, communication patterns, decision-making processes.

blocks.name: Entity Structure
blocks.description: Legal entity type, jurisdiction, formation status.

blocks.name: Vision Alignment
blocks.description: Shared understanding of where the company is going and what success looks like.

blocks.name: Founder Assessment
blocks.description: Each founder's contributions, capabilities, risk tolerance, and commitment level.

blocks.name: Roles & Decision Rights
blocks.description: Who owns what domains, how decisions get made, authority boundaries.

blocks.name: Financial Picture
blocks.description: Current financial contributions, runway, personal financial situations.

blocks.name: Ownership Axes
blocks.description: The dimensions along which ownership gets evaluated: contribution, risk, opportunity cost, etc.

blocks.name: Standards Model
blocks.description: Industry benchmarks, standard splits, comparable company data.

blocks.name: Triggers Framework
blocks.description: Events or milestones that could trigger ownership changes (vesting cliffs, performance, departure).

blocks.name: Compensation Levers
blocks.description: Salary, equity, benefits, and how they interact with the ownership split.

blocks.name: Starting Split
blocks.description: The initial equity allocation among founders.

blocks.name: The "Big Win" Scenario
blocks.description: What happens to ownership in an exit or major liquidity event.

blocks.name: Option Pool Mechanics
blocks.description: Size, structure, and allocation plan for the employee option pool.

blocks.name: Team Comp Design
blocks.description: Compensation philosophy and structure for future team members.

blocks.name: Invisible Work Mechanism
blocks.description: How to account for and value work that isn't easily measured.
